ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., R, PG) */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the movie belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the movie (out of 10) */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer of the movie */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star of the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the movie was produced */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "gross" INTEGER /* Gross revenue of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "yearcorrect" INTEGER /* Corrected year of release (to handle potential errors) */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or catchphrase of the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary or plot description of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Information about any awards the movie has won */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current production status of the movie */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "mpaa_rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the movie */,
  "box_office_rank" INTEGER /* Current box office rank of the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_star_id FOREIGN KEY ("star_id") REFERENCES stars ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Drama, Action) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Place of birth of the director */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the director's photo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the director record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the director record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the writer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the writer */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Place of birth of the writer */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the writer's photo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the writer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the writer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stars" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "star_name" TEXT /* Name of the star */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the star */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the star */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Place of birth of the star */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the star's photo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the star record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the star record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the company's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, contributor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (out of 10) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
